name: 16S_V3_Bacteroidetes
description: 16S rRNA hypervariable region V3 in phylum Bacteroidetes. Approximately 64 bp on the E. coli numbering scheme (positions 433-497). Gram-negative anaerobes, dominant gut; e.g. Bacteroides, Prevotella. Species- to genus-level discriminating; real biological variation expected — allow high mismatch during mapping.
